hooks.command: jq -cn --arg host "$(scutil --get ComputerName 2>/dev/null || hostname -s)" --arg os "$OSTYPE" --arg uname "$(uname -srm)" --arg wsl "${WSL_DISTRO_NAME:-no}" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"SessionStart",additionalContext:"Host context: hostname=\($host) | OSTYPE=\($os) | uname=\($uname) | WSL=\($wsl)"}}'
